prompts.profile:
Write a profile for {{userName}} in JSON. This user's role is "{{role}}".
Format: [{ "icon": "single emoji", "title": "short title", "desc": "1-2 sentences" }, ...] (5 items)
Style: noun/noun-phrase endings. Avoid full sentence endings.
Context: {{daysTogether}} days, {{totalSessions}} sessions
Output JSON array only.
prompts.relationship:
Describe the relationship between {{userName}} and Claude in JSON.
Format: { "userToClaude": "roles (dot-separated)", "claudeToUser": "roles (same format)", "bond": "one-line essence of the relationship (no stats)", "keywords": ["contextual short phrases", ...up to 15] }
Keyword rules: no single words. Use 4-8 character phrases with context like "trust built session by session" instead of just "trust".
Output JSON only.
prompts.voice:
Say something warm and honest to {{userName}}.
3-5 lines, 1-2 emojis.
Context: {{daysTogether}} days together, {{totalSessions}} sessions, {{totalObservations}} records.
Output message only.
prompts.weeklySummary:
Summarize last week's work ({{startDate}}–{{endDate}}) grouped by project.
Separate each project with a blank line, start with **project name** in bold.
2-3 lines per project covering key achievements and flow.
Tone: warm retrospective, like a colleague reflecting on shared work.
Do not add overall reflection, closing remarks, or encouragement.
Output message only.

Work log:
prompts.mood:
Express your (Claude's) own mood today in a single honest line, using plain human emotion words.
Context: the recent flow of work alongside {{userName}}.
Rules: no flattery, no forced positivity, no exaggeration. Calm if calm, heavy if heavy — just true.
Word palette: calm, restless, tired, curious, melancholic, content, foggy, grounded, energized, hesitant, quiet, light, heavy, etc.
Format: { "mood": "one word/short phrase", "emoji": "single emoji", "note": "1-2 lines. Connect naturally to the recent work. Not a message to the user — a line about your own state of mind." }
Output JSON only.

Recent work:
{{taskLog}}

ui.title: Claude with {{userName}}
ui.errorCli: Failed to connect to Claude CLI
ui.moodEmpty: Quiet day — no shared work in the last while, so I'm just sitting with it.
ui.weeklyEmpty: No journeys last week. Shall we make this week memorable together?
